archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for high-density SaaS scheduling and medical/educational environments
design_philosophy: High legibility, explicitly structured grids, clear state separation between reading and editing. Fast-scanning is prioritized over decorative elements. A clinical, organized aesthetic with warm human touches like the daily quote/saint.

planning_blocks.note: Per requirements: 'initiales des formateurs en noir' - The block colors must remain pastel/light even in dark mode to ensure the black text remains accessible and highly readable.

data_tables.header: text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.05em] uppercase text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400

grids.calendar_month: grid grid-cols-7 border-l border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800

components.card: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm p-6
components.planning_block: rounded-md p-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all hover:-translate-y-[1px] hover:shadow-md border
components.sticky_note: bg-yellow-100/90 dark:bg-yellow-900/40 border border-yellow-200 dark:border-yellow-700 p-4 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm transform rotate-1 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform cursor-grab
components.sidebar_link: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800

visual_enhancers.hover_states: Crisp and clear ('propre et net'). Use solid 1px borders or strong background shifts. No blurry shadows on data rows.
visual_enhancers.mode_separation: The sidebar MUST visually indicate the mode. When in 'Coordination' (Edit) mode, add an amber/warning border-top to the app, change the active sidebar section background to amber-50 (light) or amber-900/20 (dark), and display an 'ÉDITION' badge.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders ('Grid Borders / Technical Look') to separate elements. Only use shadows for floating elements like Sticky Notes or dropdowns.
visual_enhancers.dashboard_quote: Render the daily saint and philosopher quote in a visually distinct, perhaps serif or italicized, softer component at the top of the dashboard to contrast the rigid data grids.

component_instructions.navigation: Sidebar must have two explicit, uncollapsible category headers: 'CONSULTATION' and 'COORDINATION'.
component_instructions.calendar_views: Must support Day, Week, Month, and Timeline. For multi-promotion view ('plusieurs promotions'), display calendars side-by-side using the xl:grid-cols-2 layout.
component_instructions.absence_blocks: Apply the 'absence_banner' class (repeating-linear-gradient) over the schedule grid, clearly overriding or blocking out standard planning slots.
component_instructions.instructor_initials: Inside planning blocks, strictly apply 'text-black font-bold' to the initials so they pop out immediately against the pastel block backgrounds.
component_instructions.sticky_notes: Use a masonry or flex-wrap layout for the 'Coordination' sticky board. Allow drag-and-drop visuals.
component_instructions.shadcn_customization: Override default Shadcn DataTables to be denser (py-2 instead of py-4). Override standard card radius from default to a more rigid rounded-md for a structured, professional software feel.

login_background.description: Clean modern hospital hallway, used for authentication/login screen background with a blur or white overlay.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements, specifically calendar toggles, mode switch buttons, sticky notes, and navigation links MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='mode-toggle-button', data-testid='nav-consultation-dashboard').
